generatedRules.cdl:
(architecture "ddd-core"
  (lang typescript)
  (tsconfig "packages/cli/tsconfig.json")
  (description "Generated from contract/design/profile.yaml: core context must preserve DDD layer direction.")

  (module core-domain-primitives
    (path "packages/core/src/{ast,errors,config,util}/**"))
  (module core-domain-services
    (path "packages/core/src/{validator,registry,evaluator}/**"))
  (module core-application
    (path "packages/core/src/{loader,normalizer,manifest,baseline}/**"))
  (module core-parsing
    (path "packages/core/src/{lexer,parser}/**"))
  (module core-generation
    (path "packages/core/src/generator/**"))
  (module core-report
    (path "packages/core/src/report/**"))

  (layer domain-primitives core-domain-primitives)
  (layer domain-services core-domain-services)
  (layer application core-application)
  (layer parsing core-parsing)
  (layer generation core-generation)
  (layer report core-report)

  (allow-dependency core-domain-services core-domain-primitives core-report)
  (allow-dependency core-application core-domain-primitives core-domain-services core-parsing core-generation core-report)
  (allow-dependency core-generation core-domain-services core-domain-primitives core-parsing core-report)
  (allow-dependency core-parsing core-domain-primitives)

  (deny-cycles)
  (fix "Move the dependency behind an allowed DDD layer boundary, or ask the user to approve a design-profile change."))

(core-node "core-operator-registry-aggregate"
